personal.preferred_title: AWS Data Engineer | Bedrock, RAG, Agentic AI & Cloud ETL Pipelines

summary: AWS Data Engineer with deep experience building Python-based ETL pipelines, serverless AWS data platforms, and AI-enabled data workflows. Hands-on background with S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Bedrock, PySpark, SQL, RAG-style retrieval, and agentic AI orchestration. Built production-scale telemetry pipelines, Text-to-SQL agents, forecasting workflows, and automated multi-step AI systems for scoring, retrieval, document generation, and quality control.

experience.title: Senior Data Engineer / AWS Capacity Platform Engineer - CITI
bullets: Built Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, transforming raw operational data into analytics-ready datasets.
Designed AWS-based data workflows using S3 landing zones, Glue ETL, Athena querying, and Redshift-backed forecasting workloads.
Built GenAI Text-to-SQL agents using Claude 3 Sonnet on AWS Bedrock to automate access to capacity and telemetry insights.
Developed ML forecasting workflows with Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead with 90%+ accuracy.
Created Streamlit dashboards and SQL-driven reporting layers for executive-level capacity and infrastructure decision-making.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Supported AWS cloud migration planning by assessing monitoring, data collection, and operational readiness needs.
Data-mined real-user performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify optimization opportunities.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for critical production systems.

experience.title: CA APM Consultant
bullets: Built Perl/Ksh automation scripts for performance data extraction and recurring reporting.
Managed large-scale CA APM environments with 4,000–6,000 monitored agents.
Created dashboards, alerts, and reporting modules used by application and infrastructure teams.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Java, C++, Perl, Korn Shell
skills.AWS & Cloud Data: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, Bedrock, ECS, PySpark, Hive/Hadoop
skills.AI / Agentic Systems: RAG, Vector Embeddings, GenAI Agents, Text-to-SQL, Claude 3 Sonnet, Agentic AI Workflows, MCP
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT, Data Pipelines, Data Warehousing, Dimensional Modeling, Pandas, Data Quality
skills.Tools & Infra: Airflow, Docker, Git, Streamlit, Linux/Unix, BMC TrueSight

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic AI workflow using Python, Claude Code, Grok/xAI API, FAISS, sentence-transformers, and MCP. System performs semantic duplicate detection, job scoring, resume tailoring, cover generation, quality gates, and application tracking using multi-step AI orchestration.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark for scalable ETL, analytics-ready datasets, and Text-to-SQL GenAI access patterns.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built Python/PySpark forecasting pipeline using Prophet and scikit-learn to predict infrastructure bottlenecks and surface insights through Streamlit dashboards.
